title: create: warhammer
description: small create addon with some stuff
body:
## (o_O)? About mod

**Create: warhammer** is addon to **Create**, that adds some stuff from WarHammer: 40000 - materials, creatures and equipment.

## •ᴗ• Content
Now mod has:
- steel
  ![steel ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acab4fd6e55526b75af7d3888f98debce9c5af9a_0.webp)
- adamantium
  ![cube of adamantium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/006a2ddddb650b84b073f727369eb248bfa90636.png)
- chainsword
  
  ![chainsaw looks like a sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d12ed3f319d14c0d40771e92be744aff8140be2.png)

Planned to add:
- astartes armor
- tyranids

## ⌞⌝ Screenshots

![items: steel ingot, adamantium ingot, adamant blast blend, adamantium nugget, adamantium sheet, saw chain, chainsaw engine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/767d29fdc7aaf11b0bfc6e5d9d8b3dee73ecde64.png)

![player with chainsword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59c7b760f98d5d0fccf67c2c9ea3eaf6acd7c369_0.webp)

![netherite, steel and adamant blast blend turn into adamantium ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b58ab82558345617f86f537ae0b10f8d1461df1c.png)

![chainsaw engine recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be4445a4eb831f656a13ae69b5d0495d6e38f46d.png)

-----------
It's my first mod (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶)

This mod is partially created with MCreator
